factors.rationale: The product is visible but competes with the model and background elements.
The accessory is shown being held by a person, indicating a realistic use moment.
The image suggests a positive lifestyle but does not specify a concrete benefit.
The layout has competing elements and lacks clear spacing.
The product is visible, but material quality is not emphasized.
The brand name is clearly presented, providing a trust signal.
The image has strong contrast and is generally readable.
The image conveys a clear campaign idea with lifestyle context and ad copy.
